description: Minor world adjustment and multiple bug fixes affecting UI, combat interactions, and systems.

sections.heading: Changes
items: Repositioned a Faction Warfare Outpost in Astolat to avoid overlap with mobs and dungeons
Players in the zone during patch deployment are moved to the nearest exit
sections.searchable_text: astolat outpost reposition faction warfare overlap fix

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed dash, pull, and knockback inconsistencies under high latency
Fixed incorrect Roads of Avalon zone names on login
Guild Estates UI now shows all owned Hideouts and Territories
Resolved UI freezes in Character and Guild Stats
Fixed kennel animals disappearing when inventory is full
Fixed gathering reset when swapping items
Fixed item reroll continuing past target quality
Various graphical, audio, terrain, UI, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: bug fixes latency movement ui guild estates gathering reroll
